escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war against Iran with Trump considering resuming combat operations and ceasefire deteriorating rapidly.

ticker_items: Putin test-fires new Sarmat 'Satan II' nuclear missile
Trump considering resuming combat operations against Iran
Israeli strikes kill 380 in Lebanon since April ceasefire
UAE secretly conducting attacks on Iran - WSJ reports
Iran war costs US nearly $29 billion - Pentagon

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched 200 drone strikes breaking temporary ceasefire, killing one in Dnipropetrovsk region.

middle_east.description: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanese town killed 6 people and wounded 7 others.
Israeli forces conducted intensified bombardment killing at least 87 people since Friday.
Israeli airstrikes targeting medics kill 51 people including 2 health workers

claimed_totals.claim: Deaths from US-Israel attacks on Iran
Israeli strikes killing Lebanese since ceasefire

russia.text: The war in Ukraine is coming to an end
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

russia.text: Ukraine war is 'coming to an end' after insisting Russia is fighting for a 'just cause' against the West
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

russia.text: The missile, known in the West as 'Satan II', would enter combat service by the end of the year and described it as the world's most powerful missile
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

ukraine.text: Moscow launched some 200 drone strikes in a single night, bringing an end to a temporary truce
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: The ceasefire with Iran is on life support
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Our military stands ready to respond to any act of aggression
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government representatives

middle_east.text: Tehran's latest proposal as a 'piece of garbage'
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Washington must accept Tehran's latest peace plan or face failure
middle_east.speaker: Iranian chief negotiator
middle_east.title: Iran's chief negotiator

observers.description: President Xi Jinping preparing for high-stakes Beijing summit with Trump spanning Iran, Taiwan, AI and nuclear weapons. Discussions include extending critical minerals deal amid regional tensions.
Constitutional update mandates automatic nuclear strike if Kim Jong Un assassinated. North Korean troops marched in Russia's Victory Day parade through Red Square bearing their national flag.
WSJ reports UAE has been secretly carrying out attacks on Iran. UAE also announced departure from OPEC effective May 1, ending nearly six decades of membership.

Pakistan faces renewed scrutiny over its mediator role after reports of Iranian aircraft parked at military base near Rawalpindi. Islamabad rejects allegations of militarily aiding Iran while attempting to salvage US-Iran diplomacy as ceasefire collapses.

South Korean vessel came under fire in Strait of Hormuz on May 4, prompting Trump to urge Seoul to join US-led operation to secure the waterway. Seoul also providing air defense systems to Iraq amid regional instability.
UAE has been secretly carrying out attacks on Iran according to WSJ reports. Israel has sent Iron Dome batteries and personnel to UAE according to US envoy Mike Huckabee.
Australia insists it is not involved in offensive action against Iran despite supplying Wedgetail aircraft to UAE. Government denies involvement in UAE military strikes against Iran.

Qatar is intensifying regional mediation efforts despite the Iran war bringing airstrikes and cutting off Doha's access to global oil markets. Leveraging ties to both US and Iran for diplomatic benefit.

financial.notes: Hormuz deadlock pushes oil prices higher as hopes for peace deal dwindle with Iran signaling continued resolve.

update_log.text: Trump more seriously considering resuming combat operations in Iran according to CNN report
Lebanese Health Ministry reports 380 killed in Israeli strikes since April ceasefire began
Putin announces successful test of new Sarmat intercontinental ballistic missile
WSJ reports UAE has been secretly conducting attacks on Iran during conflict
Pentagon confirms Iran war costs approaching $29 billion amid Congressional scrutiny
Trump reportedly more seriously considering resuming Iran combat operations than in weeks.
Revolutionary Guards conduct military drills in Tehran as ceasefire deteriorates.
Lebanese Health Ministry reports 380 killed since April 17 ceasefire began.
Trump heads to Beijing for talks with Xi as US-Iran ceasefire deteriorates
Israeli strikes kill 6 in southern Lebanon despite official ceasefire agreement
Russia breaks Ukraine temporary ceasefire with 200 drone strikes overnight
Trump rejects Iran proposal as 'garbage', says ceasefire on 'life support'
